'''podanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:euclidian|euclidian]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-d-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:euclidian|euclidian]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| podanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:podanithi|podanithi]] || [[word:podaniji|podaniji]] || [[word:podanishi|podanishi]] || [[word:podaniki|podaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:podanuthuthu|podanuthuthu]] || [[word:podanujuju|podanujuju]] || [[word:podanushushu|podanushushu]] || [[word:podanukuku|podanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:podanuthu|podanuthu]] || [[word:podanuju|podanuju]] || [[word:podanushu|podanushu]] || [[word:podanuku|podanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:podanufthuf|podanufthuf]] || [[word:podanufjuf|podanufjuf]] || [[word:podanufshuf|podanufshuf]] || [[word:podanufkuf|podanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:podanethe|podanethe]] || [[word:podaneje|podaneje]] || [[word:podaneshe|podaneshe]] || [[word:podaneke|podaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:podanothotho|podanothotho]] || [[word:podanojojo|podanojojo]] || [[word:podanoshosho|podanoshosho]] || [[word:podanokoko|podanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:podanotho|podanotho]] || [[word:podanojo|podanojo]] || [[word:podanosho|podanosho]] || [[word:podanoko|podanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:podanofthof|podanofthof]] || [[word:podanofjof|podanofjof]] || [[word:podanofshof|podanofshof]] || [[word:podanofkof|podanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:podan챦fth챦f|podan챦fth챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fj챦f|podan챦fj챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fsh챦f|podan챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fk챦f|podan챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:podan챦fth챦fth챦f|podan챦fth챦fth챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fj챦fj챦f|podan챦fj챦fj챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fsh챦fsh챦f|podan챦fsh챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fk챦fk챦f|podan챦fk챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:podan챦fth챦f|podan챦fth챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fj챦f|podan챦fj챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fsh챦f|podan챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fk챦f|podan챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:podan챦fth챦f|podan챦fth챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fj챦f|podan챦fj챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fsh챦f|podan챦fsh챦f]] || [[word:podan챦fk챦f|podan챦fk챦f]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:podan챈th챈|podan챈th챈]] || [[word:podan챈j챈|podan챈j챈]] || [[word:podan챈sh챈|podan챈sh챈]] || [[word:podan챈k챈|podan챈k챈]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:podanathatha|podanathatha]] || [[word:podanajaja|podanajaja]] || [[word:podanashasha|podanashasha]] || [[word:podanakaka|podanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:podanatha|podanatha]] || [[word:podanaja|podanaja]] || [[word:podanasha|podanasha]] || [[word:podanaka|podanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:podanafthaf|podanafthaf]] || [[word:podanafjaf|podanafjaf]] || [[word:podanafshaf|podanafshaf]] || [[word:podanafkaf|podanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:podanasha|podanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:podansh챘sha|podansh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podanrosha|podanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podanmusha|podanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:podanyasha|podanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodanksh챘sha|gopodanksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodankrosha|gopodankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodankmusha|gopodankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodankyasha|gopodankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:podadanasha|podadanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podadansh챘sha|podadansh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podadanrosha|podadanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podadanmusha|podadanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podadanyasha|podadanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodadanksh챘sha|gopodadanksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodadankrosha|gopodadankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodadankmusha|gopodadankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodadankyasha|gopodadankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ped챈nasha|ped챈nasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ped챈nsh챘sha|ped챈nsh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ped챈nrosha|ped챈nrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ped챈nmusha|ped챈nmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ped챈nyasha|ped챈nyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goped챈nksh챘sha|goped챈nksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goped챈nkrosha|goped챈nkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goped챈nkmusha|goped챈nkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goped챈nkyasha|goped챈nkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:podfanasha|podfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:podfansh챘sha|podfansh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:podfanrosha|podfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:podfanmusha|podfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:podfanyasha|podfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopodfanksh챘sha|gopodfanksh챘sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopodfankrosha|gopodfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopodfankmusha|gopodfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gopodfankyasha|gopodfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
